calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2018 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-989-4730 appearing
for the Plaintiff;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Trimark ERF, Inc.'s application for a right to attach order and order for a writ of attachment is granted. No opposition filed. order signed. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

NOTICE OF APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND HEARING And Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-989-4730 appearing
for the Plaintiff;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The matter was called twice. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC.'s APPLICATION OF WRIT OF POSSESSION is taken off calendar. On the second call of the matter, the court ruled as
follows: Plaintiff Trimark ERF, Inc.'s application for a writ of possession is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
